title: C5 second implementation + differential CI
manager: The second implementation — a Rust runtime that consumes the compiled IR rather than reparsing FSL — plus differential CI that runs both implementations over the full vector corpus and byte-compares canonical traces, failing on any disagreement. This is what makes N=2 real: portability stops being a promise and becomes a gate, because the instant two implementations diverge, CI goes red. It also triggers the IR freeze, and the WASM toolchain falls out of the Rust build for free.
cs: Rust T1 runtime consuming the compiled IR/JSON (no second parser); differential CI byte-compares canonical traces over the vector corpus; nightly full + PR smoke slice; triggers the IR freeze (irreversibles #14); depends on C4 (WP10.2).
